Hero.description: I dig deep into problems and craft solutions with the right technology.

Metadata.title: Christian Rodes — Product Builder
Metadata.description: Product Builder. I transform ideas into digital products that solve real world problems.

Navigation.company: Registered Limited Company in Alicante, Spain, CIF: ES-B16814840

About.label: About Me
About.p1: I am a professional operating at the intersection of business strategy and technology. I have 5+ years of experience in process optimization, project management, data analysis, and recently graduated in software development.
About.p2: Throughout my career I have always worked in international and multidisciplinary environments where I stand out for my adaptability and cross-functional communication.

0.b0: Lead the creation of digital products from discovery through technical launch.
0.b1: Combine high-fidelity Figma design with Next.js & TypeScript frontend development.
0.b2: Build own prototypes to ensure a frictionless product vision-to-code transition.

1.b0: Managed critical operations for the European market at one of the largest B2B automotive e-commerce platforms.
1.b1: Process optimisation through large-scale SQL data analysis, identifying bottlenecks across logistical and commercial workflows.
1.b2: Coordinated international teams and translated operational performance into strategic business decisions.

2.b0: Part of the international expansion team as functional bridge between sales teams and IT.
2.b1: Facilitated adoption of Salesforce and POS systems, translating store needs into technical requirements for developers.
2.b2: Ensured technology was an enabler rather than a barrier during the company''s growth into new markets.

CaseStudyPP.label: Digital Product
CaseStudyPP.title: ProductPartner.io
CaseStudyPP.desc: Creative direction and development of the services and case studies sections for the site.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-intro: Collaborating with ProductPartner, I led an iterative enhancement of their digital platform. My focus was on scaling the existing design system to introduce new service pages and a high-impact visual identity, ensuring the site effectively showcased recent projects to boost SEO and user engagement.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-1-b1: Defined the responsive visual language and layout system for the services section.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-1-b2: Designed high-fidelity prototypes in Figma before moving to code.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-1-b3: Ensured brand consistency across all pages and breakpoints.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-2-b1: Built with Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS for performance and scalability.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-2-b2: Implemented smooth animations with Framer Motion to enhance user experience.
CaseStudyPP.delivery-2-b3: Iterated quickly based on feedback, shipping incremental improvements.
CaseStudyPP.quote: "He is reliable, technically proficient, and a pleasure to work with. I thoroughly recommend him."

CaseStudyGC.label: Digital Product
CaseStudyGC.title: GolfClass
CaseStudyGC.desc: Full-stack platform connecting golf teachers and students, built as a Final Degree Project.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-intro: GolfClass was born from identifying a real gap in the market: no modern, effective platform existed to connect golf teachers with students. I designed the product around three distinct user profiles — student, teacher and administrator — each with their own tailored features and permissions.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-1-b1: Real-time chat between teachers and students.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-1-b2: Class booking calendar with availability management.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-1-b4: Course search and filtering by location and level.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-2-b1: Full admin panel to manage users, courses and bookings.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-2-b2: Create, edit and delete operations across all entities.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-2-b3: Role-based access control: student, teacher and admin.
CaseStudyGC.delivery-2-b4: Dashboard with booking overview by status (pending, confirmed, completed), peak demand hours and top-booked instructors.
CaseStudyGC.quote: "An impeccable project that combines astute business vision with the effective development of a complete product."

Home.h1-sub-02: from strategy to design, development and growth.
Home.strategy-03: Conducting market research, defining the product vision, setting clear objectives, and crafting a roadmap for success.
Home.design-03: Transforming ideas into intuitive user experiences through thoughtful prototyping, testing and visual design.
Home.development-03: Building high-quality digital products in-house or through collaboration with an external team.
Home.growth-03: Analysing performance, refining functionality, and supporting marketing and sales strategies for sustained success.
Home.work-sub-01: A curated selection of varied partnerships.
Home.work-sub-02: Get in touch to discover more.
Home.bona: Multilingual presence built on a modern content management system, boosting online visibility, user engagement and bookings.
Home.brokerage: Developed a robust digital platform for The Brokerage, enhancing buyer and seller experience in the real estate sector.
Home.edesk: Restructured product management practices and revamped a B2B SaaS platform, enhancing support for 7,000+ ecommerce sellers.
Home.okadoc: Led and executed product strategy for a multisided platform (B2B, B2C, B2B2C), enhancing access to healthcare across multiple regions.
Home.headway: Strategic advisory, brand design, website development and brand collateral creation for Headway Coaching, a personal coaching brand.

Home.accreditations: We have helped aspiring organisations earn globally recognised accreditations.

Home.about-p2: I help businesses shape, build, and grow exceptional digital products.
Home.about-p3: For over 15 years, I have worked across a range of industries to define strategies, design seamless user experiences, and bring products to market.
Home.about-p4: During this time, I have balanced independent consulting with in-house roles, gaining a deep understanding of what makes businesses thrive.
Home.about-p5-03: , where I now work exclusively to create high-impact digital solutions.
Home.quote-01: As a founder with a busy schedule, I needed someone who could make a difference with their expertise and confidence. Colin exceeded expectations, swiftly implementing a wave of positive changes.
Home.quote-02: Colin has all the skills you would want in a product leader: smart, creative, pragmatic, with a solid understanding of technology and a flair for design.
Home.quote-03: A detail-oriented and results-driven leader who brings a unique combination of product expertise and business acumen to every project he tackles.

Services.lifecycle: Handling the entire product life cycle
